creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ganbold Tsagaankhuu from comment #12)

There is no need. See comment #3

svn co svn+ssh://repo.freebsd.org/ports/branches/2020Q3/databases/ateam_mysql57_ldap_auth
svn: E170000: URL 'svn+ssh://repo.freebsd.org/ports/branches/2020Q3/databases/ateam_mysql57_ldap_auth' doesn't exist

This port was added after the branching of 2020Q3

You can close this PR :-)
